personal.name: Harsh Wardhan
personal.bio: Motivated and detail-oriented B.Tech student with a strong foundation in Java, data structures, and web development. Experienced in building real-world applications through academic projects and internships. Actively involved in the Career Development Cell, contributing to event coordination and team collaboration.

certifications.name: Linux Fundamentals
certifications.description: Online non-credit course authorized by LearnQuest and offered through Coursera.

certifications.name: Introduction to Java
certifications.description: Learned object-oriented programming concepts, syntax, basic data structures, and hands-on programming in Java.

certifications.name: Database Management Essentials
certifications.description: Learned core database concepts including data models, normalization, relational database design, and practical SQL skills.

experience.description: Developed a Hotel Management System for room bookings and billing. Built a Simple Banking App for transactions and a Student Grade Tracker to record performance.
Coordinated and managed multiple college events, collaborating with student committees and faculty, and handling logistics and on-ground operations.

projects.title: E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: A full-stack e-commerce solution featuring secure payment integration, user authentication, and an admin dashboard.

projects.title: Task Management App
projects.description: A minimalist productivity tool with drag-and-drop features and real-time synchronization.

projects.title: Finance Dashboard
projects.description: Interactive data visualization dashboard for personal finance tracking.
